text.tspan: · red = ABORT this device (logs the reason, continues with the next device; ANY abort marks the whole Job Result FAILED at the end)
Already on target → no-op if committed;
No expected size → warn; rely on
Opt-in: quiet SELinux noise on terminals
corroborated by ONE shared partitions read
classic copy in worker thread; progress:
learn address at first sighting → keyed polls
track our op-uuid in the operation ledger
— SNMP-only source); else a reminder logs
Engine-idle gate before EVERY install write:
Wait for reload: must observe the device
go DOWN, then boot the target stably
the device, the upgrade stays committed)
